summary: Completed testing of Member Dashboard 'My Dining' tab. Fixed a backend bug where dining history API was not returning reservations when both user_id and email were provided. All 17 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified: Stats cards (Reservations, Pet Buddy Visits, Meetup Requests), My Reservations section with upcoming/past reservations, Pet Buddy Visits section, and navigation to Dine page via 'Book New' button.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in /api/dine/my-dining-history endpoint - was using user_id OR email exclusively, now uses $or query to match either field for reservations and visits
updated_files: /app/backend/dine_routes.py - Fixed my-dining-history query logic to use $or for user_id/email matching
seed_data_creation: Created test reservation at TherPup Café for test@example.com (res-49ee2981d0fc)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Member Dashboard Dining tab is fully functional. Test user test@example.com has 1 pending reservation at TherPup Café. Backend APIs for dining history, reservations, visits, and meetups all working correctly.

frontend_ui_tests.dining_tab_navigation: PASS - Dining tab clickable and loads content
frontend_ui_tests.stats_cards: PASS - Shows Reservations (1), Pet Buddy Visits (0), Meetup Requests (0)
frontend_ui_tests.my_reservations_section: PASS - Shows upcoming reservation at TherPup Café
frontend_ui_tests.reservation_details: PASS - Shows restaurant name, location, date, time, pending status
frontend_ui_tests.pet_buddy_visits_section: PASS - Shows empty state with helpful message

dining_history_query_bug.issue: my-dining-history endpoint was using user_id exclusively when provided, ignoring email parameter. Reservations created with email only were not returned.
dining_history_query_bug.fix: Changed query logic to use MongoDB $or operator to match either user_id OR email for reservations and visits
dining_history_query_bug.verification: API now returns reservations when queried with both user_id and email parameters
